sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출이 246억 3,300만 달러로 전년 대비 14% 늘었고, 순이익은 58억 달러로 전년 동기 41억 달러에서 크게 증가했다.
분기 중 자사주 63억 달러를 매입하고 배당을 포함해 약 74억 달러를 주주에게 환원했다.

businessChanges.text: 서비스 매출이 17% 늘며 강한 분기를 보냈고, 뱅킹은 분기 최대 규모의 M&A 실적 속에 수수료가 12% 증가했다.
자산관리 매출이 11% 늘었고, 미국 소비자 카드는 매출 4% 성장과 함께 20%에 가까운 수익률을 기록했다.
회사는 변혁(Transformation) 프로그램이 대부분 목표 수준에 도달했고 사업 매각의 최종 단계에 진입했다고 밝혔다.

financialHighlights.text: 보통주 자기자본비율(CET1) 12.7%, 주당 장부가치 112.22달러, 주당 유형장부가치 99.01달러를 기록했다.
마켓 부문 매출이 분기 기준 70억 달러를 넘어섰다.

watchItems.text: 5월 인베스터 데이에서 제시할 향후 전략과 RoTCE 목표 달성 경로를 지켜볼 필요가 있다.
자본환원 지속 여력과 자사주 매입 속도를 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 c-20260414xex99d1.htm EX-99.1 ​ Exhibit 99.1 ​ ​ For Immediate Release Citigroup Inc. (NYSE: C) APRIL 14, 2026 ​ FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS AND KEY METRICS ​ ​ CHAIR AND CEO COMMENTARY ​ ​ Citi Chair and CEO Jane Fraser said, “We’re off to an exceptionally strong start in 2026, with revenue up 14% and net income growing 42%. Services had an outstanding quarter with revenue up 17% and Markets crossed $7 billion in revenue. Banking continued to build momentum with fees up 12% amid a record first quarter in M&A. Wealth saw revenue grow 11% and continued to improve its returns and U.S. Consumer Cards saw 4% revenue growth and returns of nearly 20%. Our diversified business model continues to drive consistent revenue growth and we remain a source of financial strength and trust for our clients during uncertain times. ​ “We’ve entered into the final phase of our divestitures and 90%  Normalized numeric aliases: $7 billion = 70억 달러; $7 = 7달러.

of our Transformation programs are now at or near our target state. We demonstrated our commitment to returning capital by repurchasing $6.3 billion shares during the quarter. ​ “We remain very much on track to deliver the 10-11% RoTCE target this year. I’m excited for next month’s Investor Day where we’ll discuss our path forward and how we will realize the significant upside Citi offers,” Ms. Fraser concluded. RETURNED ~$7.4 BILLION IN THE FORM OF COMMON SHARE REPURCHASES AND COMMON DIVIDENDS PAYOUT RATIO OF 134% (3) COMMON EQUITY TIER 1 CAPITAL RATIO OF 12.7% (4) BOOK VALUE PER SHARE OF $112.22 TANGIBLE BOOK VALUE PER SHARE OF $99.01 (5) ​ ​ New York, April 14, 2026 – Citigroup Inc. today reported ne  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.3 billion = 63억 달러; $7.4 BILLION = 74억 달러; $5.8 billion = 58억 달러; $24.6 billion = 246억 달러; $4.1 billion = 41억 달러; $6.3 = 6.3달러; $7.4 = 7.4달러; $112.22 = 112.22달러; $5.8 = 5.8달러; $99.01 = 99.01달러; $3.06 = 3.06달러; $24.6 = 24.6달러; $4.1 = 4.1달러; $1.96 = 1.96달러.

evenues of $21.6 billion for the first quarter 2025. ​ Revenues increased 14% (6) from the prior-year period, driven by growth in each of Citi’s five interconnected businesses (7) and Legacy Franchises in All Other , as well as the impact of foreign exchange translation, partially offset by a decline in Corporate/Other, also in All Other . ​ Net income was $5.8 billion, compared to $4.1 billion in the prior-year period, driven by higher revenues and a lower effective tax rate, partially offset by higher expenses and a higher provision for credit losses. ​ Earnings per share of $3.06 increased from $1.96 per diluted share in the prior-year period, reflecting higher net income and a lower share count due to share repurchases. ​ Percentage comparisons throughout this press release are calculated for the first quarte  Normalized numeric aliases: $21.6 billion = 216억 달러; $5.8 billion = 58억 달러; $4.1 billion = 41억 달러; $21.6 = 21.6달러; $5.8 = 5.8달러; $4.1 = 4.1달러; $3.06 = 3.06달러; $1.96 = 1.96달러.

​ First Quarter Financial Results ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ Citigroup ($ in millions, except per share amounts and as otherwise noted) ​ ​ ​ 1Q’26 ​ ​ ​ 4Q’25 ​ ​ ​ 1Q’25 ​ ​ ​ QoQ% ​ ​ ​ YoY% Total revenues, net of interest expense ​ 24,633 ​ 19,871 ​ 21,596 ​ 24% ​ 14% ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ Total operating expenses ​ 14,311 ​ 13,840 ​ 13,425 ​ 3% ​ 7% ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ Net credit losses ​ 2,208 ​ 2,190 ​ 2,459 ​ 1% ​ (10)% Net ACL build / (release) (a) ​ 581 ​ 23 ​ 210 ​ N  Normalized numeric aliases: 24,633 million = 246억 3,300만 달러; 19,871 million = 198억 7,100만 달러; 21,596 million = 215억 9,600만 달러; 14,311 million = 143억 1,100만 달러; 13,840 million = 138억 4,000만 달러; 13,425 million = 134억 2,500만 달러; 2,208 million = 22억 800만 달러; 2,190 million = 21억 9,000만 달러; 2,805 million = 28억 500만 달러; 5,448 million = 54억 4,800만 달러; 2,523 million = 25억 2,300만 달러; 1,578 million = 15억 7,800만 달러; 1,288 million = 12억 8,800만 달러; 1,340 million = 13억 4,000만 달러; 5,939 million = 59억 3,900만 달러; 4,108 million = 41억 800만 달러.
